## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Logic and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, review progress, and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX introduced Bailey Seybolt as the new managing editor for Logic's content](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Logic provided valuable positioning insights, helping GrowthX tailor content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [First calibration blog post delivered; Logic to review and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Looker dashboard set up for Logic, providing comprehensive analytics on website performance](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Content impact on organic traffic expected within 2-3 months, with consistent growth thereafter](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Roles

  - [Bailey Seybolt: New managing editor at GrowthX, background in SaaS marketing and content](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Steve Krenzel: Founder of Logic, focusing on content strategy after successful early-year content](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Azzam Aijazi: Recently joined Logic, leading marketing and growth efforts](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)

### Content Strategy and Positioning

  - [Logic provided detailed positioning document, crucial for tailoring content](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Emphasis on avoiding miscategorization (e.g., not a document automation platform)](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Content titles may evolve to align with SEO best practices while maintaining accurate positioning](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Calibration blog post delivered, structured for SEO with sections on benefits, automation with Logic, and case study](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)

### Analytics and Reporting

  - [Looker dashboard set up with 7 pages of analytics data](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Key metrics: session mediums, engaged sessions, landing page performance, query rankings](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [Goal to increase engaged sessions to at least 50% of total sessions](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [LLM referral breakdown shows traffic from AI platforms (currently Claude and Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)

### Content Impact and Timeline

  - [Impressions expected to increase within 1-2 weeks of content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
  - [Noticeable impact on organic traffic anticipated in 2-3 months](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
  - [Consistent month-over-month growth observed across GrowthX clients](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Logic to review and provide feedback on the calibration blog post](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [GrowthX to revise blog post based on feedback and prep for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Set up image generation workflow for Logic's content](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Scale to 3 blog posts next week, aiming for 5 the following week](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
  - [Explore setting up GA4 explorations to track user journeys on Logic's site](https://fathom.video/share/ky7cNSHCXz8AKgYCTrVbex-HEdyos2mJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
